calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'s Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment as to defendant Med Thrive Cooperative, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and stipulated judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org (L&M302)
